summary: Smart budgeting on a monthly salary of ₹1 lakh depends on effectively managing in-hand income, controlling expenses, prioritising savings, and diversifying investments for long-term financial stability.&nbsp;

summary: Credit card EMI conversion lets you pay off large transactions in smaller, fixed monthly instalments with interest. Here's how it is different from paying the minimum due and which option is better for your credit score.

title: Equity, debt or gold? This portfolio mix delivered the best risk-adjusted returns
summary: Asset allocation is crucial for long-term wealth creation. A balanced portfolio of equities, debt, and gold offers stability and higher returns, as shown in FundsIndia's report. Diversification reduces volatility and downside risk, ensuring a smoother investment journey over time.

title: I asked ChatGPT if a middle-class Indian can afford a Sweden trip in ₹1.5 lakh. AI's answer was brutally honest
summary: A seven-day Sweden trip sounds romantic on paper, but when flights, visas, hostels and daily costs are added up, is Sweden actually realistic for a middle-class Indian traveller on a ₹1.5 lakh budget? We asked ChatGPT for a brutally honest financial and logistical breakdown.

title: How long do you need to stay invested to avoid negative returns? This data has an answer
summary: FundsIndia's report highlights that long-term equity investment, defined as 7 years or more, is essential for wealth creation. Historically, equities have shown strong recovery after market downturns, with significant returns over extended periods compared to real estate and debt instruments.

title: Got a bonus to invest? Gold at record highs and markets choppy, this 50:50 formula may work better
summary: Investors are facing challenges in volatile markets, with traditional options like fixed deposits yielding 6-7.5%. Experts recommend a disciplined investment approach, splitting funds between Arbitrage Funds and Nifty 50 Index Funds for long-term growth.

title: Should retirees in India use credit cards? Key benefits and risks explained
summary: Credit cards for retirees offer secure cashless payments, rewards, emergency liquidity and credit score benefits, but disciplined usage is essential to avoid debt, fraud risks and financial strain. Proper professional guidance must be taken before deciding on any particular credit card.&nbsp;

title: Wipro fixes June 5 as record date for Rs 15,000 crore share buyback at Rs 250 apiece
summary: Wipro Limited has set June 5, 2026, as the record date for its Rs 15,000 crore share buyback. The IT major's board and shareholders previously approved the repurchase of up to 60 crore shares at Rs 250 each. This tender offer will allow eligible shareholders to participate in the buyback.

title: Gold import duty hike threatens decade-low volumes for jewellery retailers in FY27, warns Crisil
summary: The organised gold jewellery retail sector is set for a steep 13–15% volume decline to a decade low in FY27, driven by the government’s import duty hike to 15%. Rising prices, weaker affordability and a shift toward coins and bars are pressuring jewellery demand, warns Crisil.
